docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,310.41 FILED BY ANTOS, MELANIE B. AS TO DEFENDANT GLADGO, JEFFREY (C/O ANDRONICO'S) 000 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
